U

unregAgentAdmin(String) - Method in interface com._1c.v8.ibis.admin.IAgentAdminConnection
Deletes a central server administrator.
unregAssignmentRule(UUID, UUID, UUID) - Method in interface com._1c.v8.ibis.admin.IAgentAdminConnection
Deletes an assignment rule from the list of working server rules.
unregCluster(UUID) - Method in interface com._1c.v8.ibis.admin.IAgentAdminConnection
Deletes a cluster.
unregClusterAdmin(UUID, String) - Method in interface com._1c.v8.ibis.admin.IAgentAdminConnection
Deletes a cluster administrator.
unregResourceConsumptionCounter(UUID, String) - Method in interface com._1c.v8.ibis.admin.IAgentAdminConnection
Deletes a resource counter
Cluster authentication is required: IAgentAdminConnection.authenticate(java.util.UUID, java.lang.String, java.lang.String)
unregResourceConsumptionLimit(UUID, String) - Method in interface com._1c.v8.ibis.admin.IAgentAdminConnection
Deletes a resource limits
Cluster authentication is required: IAgentAdminConnection.authenticate(java.util.UUID, java.lang.String, java.lang.String)
unregWorkingServer(UUID, UUID) - Method in interface com._1c.v8.ibis.admin.IAgentAdminConnection
Deletes a working server and removes its cluster registration.
updateInfoBase(UUID, IInfoBaseInfo) - Method in interface com._1c.v8.ibis.admin.IAgentAdminConnection
Changes infobase parameters.
updateInfoBaseShort(UUID, IInfoBaseInfoShort) - Method in interface com._1c.v8.ibis.admin.IAgentAdminConnection
Changes short infobase description.
